description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ubuntu:latest Docker image. Define a single job named test in the default test stage that runs the following shell commands in order: pycodestyle sp *.py, flake8 sp *.py, ./lxdhelper.py, ./sp -l -c 101 /home/gitlab-runner/sosreport-ACustomer.10101-20180904170335.tar.xz, and ./sp -l -c 102 /home/gitlab-runner/102/. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
